description: Unit: paste handler identifies clipboard image MIME entries and ignores non-image entries
Unit: pasting multiple images produces one upload job per image in deterministic order
Unit: immediate upload starts without waiting for comment submit action
Integration: successful clipboard upload creates file/document records tied to the target ticket
Unit: deterministic filename generator emits expected name pattern for pasted images
UI: uploading placeholder image block appears while upload request is in-flight
UI: placeholder is replaced by attachment-backed image node after upload success
UI: upload failure state renders clear error affordance with retry/remove actions
UI: retry action re-attempts failed image upload and transitions to success state
Serialization: submitted BlockNote payload stores attachment references and excludes raw base64 image bytes
Regression: non-image comment content serialization remains unchanged
Render: saved comment image node resolves to attachment-serving URL and displays inline in ticket thread
Render auth: unauthorized user cannot load comment image attachment URL
Render auth: authorized user can load comment image attachment URL
Outbound mapping: comment image attachment references are collected for email composition
Outbound CID: one CID attachment is generated per inline comment image
Outbound HTML: image src values are rewritten from internal attachment refs/URLs to matching cid references
Outbound fallback: CID generation failure retains renderable attachment URL instead of broken image
Compose state: pasted draft images are tracked for cancel-flow keep/delete behavior
UI: canceling draft with pasted images prompts keep-vs-delete decision
UI: cancel keep path closes draft without deleting uploaded pasted-image documents
API integration happy path: cancel delete action hard deletes selected pasted draft images from object storage and metadata tables
API integration guard path: delete attempt is rejected for image already referenced by a saved ticket comment
API integration guard path: user without permission cannot hard delete pasted draft image artifact
Validation: unsupported clipboard MIME type is rejected before upload
Validation: image larger than configured max size is rejected with user-visible error
Feature flag off: clipboard image paste flow is disabled and existing editor behavior remains active
Feature flag on: clipboard image paste flow is enabled for eligible tenants/users
Observability: upload success/failure logs include ticket id, user id, and artifact identity
Observability: cancel delete logs include chosen action (keep/delete) and hard-delete result
Observability: outbound email logs indicate CID generation path vs URL fallback for each image
E2E: paste image to ticket comment, submit comment, and ticket thread displays inline image from attachment URL
E2E: paste image, cancel draft, choose delete, and uploaded artifact no longer exists in ticket documents
E2E: pasted-image ticket comment sent via outbound email includes CID MIME image part and inline renderable HTML
E2E: CID generation failure path still produces readable outbound email with attachment URL image source
